# Tiny R8 / ProGuard mapping file used by symbolize.bats and
# test_deobfuscate_r8.py. Mirrors the real format: each block starts with
# `<originalClass> -> <obfuscatedClass>:` followed by indented method/field
# lines. Comments and blank lines are ignored.

io.flutter.embedding.engine.FlutterJNI -> Ka.n:
    1:1:void <init>():52:52 -> <init>
    1:1:void onSurfaceDestroyed():123:123 -> l
    void onSurfaceCreated(android.view.Surface) -> a
    int someField -> f
    int anotherField -> g

io.flutter.embedding.engine.FlutterJNI$Inner -> Ka.n$a:
    1:1:void surfaceDestroyed() -> surfaceDestroyed

com.example.demo.MainActivity -> e8.a:
    1:1:void onCreate(android.os.Bundle):34:34 -> a
    1:1:void run():40:40 -> run
